fields.name: Node Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the node on the imported file.

fields.name: Node Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies a type. This field is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Data Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the data and provides additional explanation of the tags in the Node Name.

fields.name: MinOccurs
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lowest number of times that the node appears in the XML schema. If the value in this field is 1 or higher, then the node is considered mandatory to create a valid XMLport.

fields.name: MaxOccurs
fields.tooltip: Specifies the highest number of times that the node appears in the XML schema.

fields.name: Choice
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the node has two or more sibling nodes that function as options.

fields.name: Selected
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the node is included in the related XMLport.

fields.name: Simple Data Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the base (unstructured) type of the schema element, such as the Decimal and Date strings.
